caption: A woman with light brown hair styled in a high bun and wearing black over-ear headphones is seated in a studio. She is wearing a black t-shirt with a circular graphic on the chest and is positioned behind a professional black microphone. In the background, a television screen displays the word "Johnson" in red text over a gray background. To the right, a yellow vertical stripe separates the screen area from a black wall. On-screen graphics include a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101" and another that says "STUDIO PODCAST." As the sequence progresses, the woman looks slightly to her left and smiles, her expression shifting from a soft gaze to a more pronounced smile while she remains stationary in her seat.
